case_title: ELITE FIXTURES LLC VS. CATCH MARKETING SERVICES INC

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELITE FIXTURES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CATCH MARKETING SERVICES INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE FIXTURES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATCH MARKETING SERVICES INC $5,172.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 INTEREST, $20.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,417.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
